core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine Fintech precision with Gaming dopamine.
Emotion First: Relieve stress, don't just show numbers.
Dark Mode Native: Designed for low-light anxiety reduction.
Privacy & Trust: Local data feel, secure visuals.
design_philosophy.target_audience: German speakers (25-45) needing debt relief motivation.

typography.installation_instructions: Use expo-font to load 'Outfit' (Bold, SemiBold) and 'PlusJakartaSans' (Regular, Medium). Fallback to system sans-serif if loading fails.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid: Mix of square (1x1) and tall/wide (2x1, 1x2) cards for visual interest.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use expo-blur (BlurView) with intensity 20-30 and a subtle white border (opacity 0.1).
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full screen gradients. Use mesh gradients or blurred orbs in the background.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide-react-native or Phosphor Icons (Duotone). Color: #8892B0 or #00D4AA for active states.

onboarding_empathy.desc: Stressed person looking at laptop - for 'Empathy' screen.

freedom_goal.desc: Silhouette of happy people at sunset - for 'Freedom Date' reveal.

abstract_bg.desc: Geometric abstract neon - for Splash/Home BG.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'npx expo install nativewind tailwindcss react-native-reanimated expo-blur expo-haptics expo-linear-gradient expo-font' immediately.
SETUP: Configure 'nativewind' for styling. If not possible, strictly follow the 'colors' and 'spacing' objects for StyleSheet.
LANGUAGE: All visible text MUST be in GERMAN (DE). Currency format: '1.250,00 €'.
THEME: Force Dark Mode. Do not rely on system theme switch. Set 'userInterfaceStyle': 'dark' in app.json.
NAVIGATION: Use 'expo-router' with a custom TabBar component. The TabBar should float (absolute position, bottom 20, margin-x 20, rounded-full, glass effect).
CHARTS: Use 'victory-native' for the Debt Overview and Progress charts. Style them with the Brand Primary (#00D4AA) and Secondary (#7B61FF) colors.
AI COACH: The chat interface should feel like a premium messaging app (WhatsApp/Telegram style) but with 'Fixi' branding. Bubbles: User (Brand Primary), AI (Card Secondary).
ONBOARDING: Use a PagerView or Horizontal FlatList. Animate elements with 'react-native-reanimated' (FadeInUp, SlideInRight).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts everywhere. Use asymmetry.
Transitions: Use 'LayoutAnimation' or 'Reanimated' for all state changes. No instant jumps.
Touch Targets: All buttons/inputs must be at least 44x44px.
Safe Area: Always wrap screens in 'SafeAreaView' (from react-native-safe-area-context) but handle the background color properly to avoid white bars.
Testing: Add 'testID' to all interactive elements.
